title: Trigger Happy Ghast
description: Shoot Fireballs Out of The Happy Ghast
body:
**Destroy everything in your path!**

Use a warped fungus on a stick to shoot fireballs out of the happy ghast. 

This mod gives another use to both the happy ghast, and the warped fungus on a stick.

## Client/Server
Play on your own or on a server!

Servers only require the mod to be installed on the server, players don't need to install it themselves.

## Config
There is a config file to change the explosion damage done by shot fireball. It is set to 1 (normal ghast firebal) by default. Setting it to 0 will damage entities if hit, but not damage any blocks.

You can also control the amount of durability the warped_fungus_on_a_stick will use.

## Discord
Join The Discord: [Link](https://discord.gg/zHzFgWX8KW)
